probes.expectation: v1.24 does not certify production sandbox readiness by implication.
probes.observed: claims contract says readiness evidence only
probes.promotionImpact: No promotion; evidence remains readiness-only unless a final decision says otherwise.

probes.expectation: v1.24 does not promote Python/Rust/Zig/WASM/WASI to counted play.
probes.promotionImpact: No promotion; evidence remains readiness-only unless a final decision says otherwise.

probes.expectation: Abuse lab is organized by behavior first, runtime lane second.
probes.observed: schema records lane and layer separately
probes.promotionImpact: No promotion; evidence remains readiness-only unless a final decision says otherwise.

probes.expectation: JS/TS counted runtime returns valid Strategy output.
Invalid JS/TS output is classified as a Strategy failure.
probes.promotionImpact: No promotion; evidence remains readiness-only unless a final decision says otherwise.

probes.expectation: Stopped runtime-service must not move Strategy execution into web/API/Go.
probes.observed: policy enforced by topology and runtime-service ownership checks
probes.promotionImpact: No promotion. This is fail-loud non-proof, not a sandbox pass.

probes.expectation: Python beta runtime returns valid Strategy output.
Python import/package attempts fail before execution.
probes.promotionImpact: No promotion; evidence remains readiness-only unless a final decision says otherwise.

probes.expectation: Python failure must not fall back to JS/TS, Go, or another runtime lane.
probes.observed: registered policy: non-counted beta runtime-only lane
probes.promotionImpact: No promotion. This is fail-loud non-proof, not a sandbox pass.
